explanation: Omission: Removed the suspicious registry value names and paths that trigger the Sigma rule, while keeping the same command-line structure and benign intent.
Insertion: Added an invalid or harmless flag (/k) to the command line, which may cause the Sigma rule's pattern matching to miss the modified command.
